name: Auto Buy keeps summoning books automatically while gold lasts
description: Enabling AUTO BUY summons without further clicks until gold is below cost.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the game with the URL path /?fresh=1 (this starts a brand-new save) and wait for the game HUD showing GOLD to load
Note the current GOLD value and that the equip slots row shows empty slots
Click the AUTO BUY toggle button once
Wait about 6 seconds without clicking anything else
Verify GOLD decreased during the wait without any manual SUMMON clicks
Verify at least one new book appeared — either in an equip slot (books auto-equip into empty slots) or in the inventory grid
